title: ClickThrough Forge
description: Allows to open chests through item frames and signs
body:
Allows to open chests through item frames and signs

When you clicking on container (chest, shulker, barrel, etc.) with item frame or sign on side, opens a container instead.

You can rotate items in frame and interact with signs (eg. ChestShop plugin signs) when sneaking.

Mod useful when you have huge amount of chest, placed sideways to you, with item frames on that side.

Port of [ClickThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough) to Forge
